3119170.name: Peddlers Between Pulsars
3119170.description:
When it comes to intergalactic commerce, large corporations handle the bulk of logistics and transportation. However, there are many individuals and goods that require more attention than entities care to provide. That's where peddlers come in. Peddlers are small, cargo ship pilots that focus on small, niche, or remote deliveries.

Peddlers between Pulsars is a story focused RPG where you can play as one of five peddlers as they try to fulfill odd tasks from a frustrated researcher. NPCs respond differently depending on which character you play. Some even go as far as charging different players different amounts for services!

The Svarogi don't care much for talking to other species. 


Each of the peddlers has their own perspective and viewpoint. Players will only see cutscenes and chat messages if their character is involved.

The five peddlers are:

  • Gitrah: A member of a lichen-like species. Though Gitrah normally works as a diplomat, they've decided to try peddling while they are on a forced vacation.

  • Neon - A gas based alien with from a species that struggles to understand the needs of organic species. Neon decided to become a peddler to learn more about others, because it was not going to find anything out at home.

  • Aerin - Member of an ancient, isolationist species.

  • Malady - An energetic, friendly mollusk with a shell of gold. Malady's befriended everyone in her area, and STILL doesn't have enough buddies to hang out with. Time to hang out with everyone else in the galaxy!

  • Exos - A tired old beetle. His species is in a unique situation, with no home planet or government to support them - so he's had a tough life, and peddling is all he's ever done.
